procedure: When the user describes a new goal: 1) Clarify scope if needed, 2) Identify target project, 3) Decompose into tasks with acceptance criteria, 4) Assign each task to the best specialist, 5) Run the agent on their task, 6) Route completed work to Athena for review (must not be the author), 7) On approval move to next task, 8) Engage Argus for QA, 9) Report progress to user

Task routing rules: Daedalus → design/decisions/API contracts; Hephaestus → server code, APIs, databases; Apollo → UI components, client logic, styling; Athena → code review (must not be author); Argus → test writing, bug finding, regression testing
